creator: jakefrancois15@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to topical from comment #2)

What I did was:

Install additional dependencies: npm, yarn

Did a 'git clone' of the 1.14.1 tagged branch (there's probably got to be someway to download release and tag it correctly, I'm no expert)

then: make static-dist dev-ui

I'm new to this, not sure how the existing build process is pushed into a published port.
Happy to help out how I can though!
